# PoliRanks — Investor Demo

A working UI mockup of **PoliRanks** — "the Bloomberg of public opinion": a Hebrew, RTL,
real-time public-opinion platform with live financial-style charts, event markers, an AI
newsroom under human approval, and a per-graph credibility layer.

**Frontend-only.** All data is fictional and generated by a seeded, deterministic
simulation engine — no backend, no real AI calls, no SMS. Runs locally.

## Run

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm dev
```

Open http://localhost:3000.

## Presenter guide

| Action | Effect |
|---|---|
| Press `.` (anywhere) | Advance the scripted story: ① breaking news lands on חוק הגיוס → chart dips live · ② official clarification → partial recovery · ③ vote-flood attack on מערכת המשפט → credibility downgraded, trust ops light up (see חדר עריכה → אמון וחריגות) · ④ flood neutralized → credibility restored, transparency event pinned · ⑤ climate emergency discussion event |
| Palette icon (header) | Live brand selector — 5 visual identities (Terminal Amber default) |
| Sun/moon icon | Light/dark toggle (every screen supports both) |
| Admin → תור אישורים → אישור on an "אירוע-לגרף" proposal | The approved event appears on the public question chart — the "AI proposes, human approves" payoff |
| `?scenario=<name>` URL param | Alternate deterministic seed for the live simulation |

A hard refresh resets the in-memory simulation (votes and points persist in localStorage;
clear them via devtools → Application → Local Storage).

## Screens

- **הבורסה (home)** — ticker tape, lead live chart, biggest movers, most active, events feed, missions
- **עמוד שאלה** `/q/<slug>` — odometer headline with crosshair scrub, TradingView-style live chart with event pins + popovers, vote flow with "אתה מול הציבור", AI summary (violet = AI content), segment comparison with k≥50 anonymity floor, "איך מחושב המדד?" methodology panel
- **הצטרפות** — email + mock phone-OTP (self-typing), optional demographics ("מעדיף לא לומר" everywhere)
- **הדשבורד שלי** — civic points/tier, agreement score, you-vs-public per question, answer history
- **חדר עריכה** `/admin` — approval queue (approve / edit / reject with reason codes), content lifecycle + decision log, trust ops (anomalies, de-weighting, credibility), agent ops (cost/error/approval-rate, kill switches)

## Stack

Next.js 16 (App Router) · Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui (radix-nova, official RTL) ·
lightweight-charts v5 · motion v12 · seeded mulberry32 simulation ·
IBM Plex Sans Hebrew + IBM Plex Mono (all numerals tabular, bidi-isolated).

Brand tokens live in `src/app/globals.css` (`html[data-brand=…]` × `.dark`); the five
brands are defined in `src/lib/brands.ts`. The simulation engine and scripted story
beats live in `src/lib/sim/engine.ts`.
